source.description: ECG-derived beat timing file recorded by the Biosiglib maintainers. The file contains beat times and the corresponding NN interval series.

processing: tk contains beat times in seconds.
dtk is a leading NaN followed by successive differences of tk.
The leading NaN preserves alignment between beat times and intervals.
Algorithms consuming dtk must apply their specified missing-value behavior.

source.description: ECG signal used by the Biosigmat Pan-Tompkins regression test and related examples.
Synthetic interval series containing a non-finite interval for hrv.tdmetrics invalid-value conformance.

processing: Contains a positive interval sequence with one Inf value.
The Inf value is invalid for hrv.tdmetrics and is retained to test rejection of non-finite intervals.

source.description: Small hand-calculated expected EDR outputs for ecg.sloperange conformance cases.

processing: positive_edr contains the analytical EDR sequence [5, 7, 6] for the small positive synthetic case.
boundary_edr contains [NaN, 7, NaN] to preserve alignment when the first and last R-wave windows are incomplete.
